  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"get application result"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/rest/financing/v2/applications/{uuid}/results"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.results</b> authority for authenticated user

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"uuid","in":"path","description":"uuid","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}

  body={undefined}

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

>
  
</StatusCodes>
